description:
A new way to collaborate

Empowering teams by messenger, meetings, calendar, docs, and emails. It's all in one place.
Base
- You can insert charts from Base dashboards into Feishu Docs for use cases such as business reports, project progress reviews, and data analysis presentations. When the data or style of the source chart changes, the chart in the document updates automatically, so you no longer need to retake screenshots manually.
App Directory
- When you use the AI features of some third-party apps in the Feishu App Directory, the usage can be covered by your organization's Feishu AI plan quota, enabling unified AI usage management and billing.
